creator: mohara@ll.mit.edu
text:
I can see the command line during the boot, and everything is fine until
I run X11R6.  Then, upon exiting X11, I wait for the command line 
shell to come back up, but instead the screen goes blank.  If I type 
"startx" (without being able to see what I'm typing), X11 will come back
up as normal, so it's still responding to the keyboard.

How-To-Repeat: The problem is unfortunately quite repeatable simply by exiting X11.
